products.title: Sapphire Pendant
products.description:
About this product:-

  • Eye-catching teardrop pendant with deep sapphire blue stone

  • Set in a gold-tone frame with a trendy chain design (chain thickness may differ)

  • Perfect balance of luxury and elegance

  • Lightweight and suitable for party wear or special occasions

  • Adjustable clasp for the perfect fit

  • A great choice for birthdays, weddings, or evening looks
